summary.text: ## Relations Overview

```mermaid
erDiagram
	AuthIdentity ||--|| ProviderIdentity : provider_identities
	AuthIdentity ||--|| AuthMfaFactor : mfa_factors
	AuthIdentity ||--|| AuthMfaRecoveryCode : mfa_recovery_codes
	AuthIdentity ||--|| AuthVerificationToken : verification_tokens
	AuthIdentity ||--|| AuthPasswordResetToken : password_reset_tokens
	ProviderIdentity ||--|| AuthVerificationToken : verification_tokens
	ProviderIdentity ||--|| AuthPasswordResetToken : password_reset_tokens

```
The ID of the auth identity.
The associated `ProviderIdentity` records.
The associated `AuthMfaFactor` records.
The associated `AuthMfaRecoveryCode` records.
The associated verification tokens.
The associated password_reset_tokens.

The associated `AuthIdentity`.

The status of the auth multifactor authentication
The provider metadata of the auth multifactor authentication

The associated `AuthIdentity`.
